chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Misc. Application No.S-368 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2025. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. ------------ The applicant has invoked the inherent jurisdiction of this court against the order dated 25-10-2023 passed by the learned 02nd Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Mehar, dismissing application u/s 22-A&B Cr.P.C. Record reflects that after filing application, the applicant and his learned counsel failed to appear to argue the application. Observing the fact that applicant and his learned counsel has lost interest to pursue the application, on 17-02-2025 last chance was accorded with the specific direction that if on next date of hearing viz today the applicant and his learned counsel fails to remain present, an appropriate order shall be passed in accordance with the law. Same is the position today. Such fact compelled the court to dismiss the application in non-prosecution. Order accordingly. J U D G E
